action.description:
Introduced by Senators Hesselbein, Habush Sinykin, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, L. Johnson, Keyeski, Larson, Pfaff, Ratcliff, Roys, Smith, Spreitzer, Wall and Wirch; 
cosponsored by Representatives McCarville, Brown, Sinicki, Tenorio, Anderson, Andraca, Arney, Bare, Billings, Cruz, DeSanto, DeSmidt, Doyle, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Goodwin, Haywood, Hong, Hysell, J.
